back_translation: But there were also false prophets who arose among the people, just as there will be false teachers in the midst of you, who will secretly bring in heretical-doctrine that leads to destruction, and they will deny the Master who has redeemed them, bringing swift destruction upon themselves
And many people will follow their depravity, and because of those people, the way of truth will be defamed
With greed, they will use words that are fabricated to exploit you. The judgment that has been determined for them from long ago does not stop, and their destruction does not slumber
For if God did not spare the angels when they sinned, but cast them down into the deepest hell, binding them in chains of darkness to await judgment
And He did not spare the world in ancient times, but preserved Noah, the proclaimer of righteousness, with seven others, when He brought the flood upon the world of the unrighteous
And He judged the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah to be destroyed, burning those cities to ashes, making them an example of what will happen to the unrighteous in the future
And He saved Lot, the righteous one, who suffered from the depraved conduct of those outside the law
Because that righteous man who lived in the midst of them, every day tormented his righteous soul because of the lawless deeds that he saw and heard
The Lord knows how to save those who are devoted-to-God from temptation, and He knows how to keep the unrighteous awaiting punishment on the day of judgment
Especially those people who walk according to the flesh, in the lust of corruption, and despise authority. They are bold-in-evil, they are stubborn, not afraid to insult the glorious-ones
While even the angels who have greater strength and power, do not utter judgmental words of insult against them in the presence of the Lord

But these people are like wild animals lacking reason, animals born by instinct to be captured and destroyed. They insult things they do not understand, and they will be destroyed in their own corruption

They will receive the wages of unrighteousness as the wickedness that returns to harm themselves. They consider revelry in the daytime to be pleasure, being blots and blemishes, indulging extravagantly while feasting with you in deception
Their eyes are full of adultery, and they do not stop sinning. They entice unstable souls. Their hearts have been trained to be greedy. They are children of curse
They have abandoned the straight way and have wandered, following the way of Balaam son of Beor, who loved the wages of unrighteousness
But he was rebuked for his transgression — a donkey without a voice spoke with a human voice and stopped the madness of this prophet
These people are springs without water, and they are mists driven by storms. The thickest darkness has been reserved for them
Because they speak boastful words that are empty, enticing with the lusts of the flesh and depravity, capturing those who have just escaped from those who live in error
They promise freedom to those people, but they themselves are slaves of corruption. For whoever is overcome by anything, that person becomes a slave of that thing

Because if when they had escaped the corruption of the world through the true knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ and Savior, then return to be entangled and overcome again, their final state is worse than their first state
Because their not having known the way of righteousness at all is better than their having known it and turning back from the holy commandment that has been given to them
What has happened to them is true according to the proverb that says: ‘A dog returns to eat what it has vomited up itself,’ and ‘A pig that has been washed returns to wallow in the mud’
